title: gardenia pyriformis subsp. pyriformis
intro: Gardenia pyriformis subsp. pyriformis, also known as the pyriform gardenia, is a plant species native to Madagascar. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Gardenia pyriformis subsp. pyriformis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea, infused in oils, or used in tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
